message:
feat(fnp-ufunc): add basic arithmetic ufuncs (unwired)

Add add, subtract, multiply, floor_divide using elementwise_binary.
Not wired to fnp-python yet - blocked on scalar return semantics
(native returns 0-d array vs numpy returns scalar for scalar inputs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
